h1.visual_description: Bold, serif font, centered or left-aligned with a numerical prefix followed by significant whitespace. Larger than body text.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but likely bold serif with smaller indentation than H1.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small superscript numbers within body text
Horizontal rule at the bottom of the page followed by small-font text starting with a number
Italicized text within parentheses or sentences
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Emphasis or mathematical variables (e.g., p value, Δt)

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric superscript for footnotes; parenthetical author-date style for internal references (e.g., BCa approach).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running headers containing page numbers on the outer edges and author surnames (e.g., '314' and 'YARROW') at the top margin.
